title: Leave it to Shizuku!
detail_text: <:th_ch0003/>Hmm......<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0203/>Kotori-san, I usually don’t see you staring at your phone for that long. What’s going on?<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0003/>I’ve been looking for a good, festive Christmas movie, but there are so many that I can’t decide at all......<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0203/>If that’s the case, leave it to me!<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0003/>You’re gonna help me? I’ve been saved~!<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0203/>First, what genre do you prefer? Anime, comedy, romance, horror, or classic? What do you have in mind?<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0003/>I see...... Since I want to watch it with Honoka-chan, Umi-chan, and the others, I want to choose a fun movie.<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0203/>A fun movie. Then, I recommend the one where a bunch of cute animals end up causing a commotion and the one with the kid stuck at home for Christmas! Here are their titles!<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0003/>Thanks Shizuku-chan! Speaking of movies, I’m curious about these other movies. Shizuku-chan, do you have time today? I’d like to watch something else that you recommend. 𝅘𝅥𝅮<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0203/>Of course!<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0000/>Translated by SIFAStheatre and Idol Story<:dt_line_end/>
